mapper.select: SELECT schedule_id, user_id, title, content, start_datetime, end_datetime, alarm_datetime, alarm_sent_yn, alarm_sent_at, created_at, updated_at FROM schedules WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY start_datetime ASC

SELECT schedule_id, user_id, title, content, start_datetime, end_datetime, alarm_datetime, alarm_sent_yn, alarm_sent_at, created_at, updated_at FROM schedules WHERE schedule_id = #{scheduleId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO schedules ( user_id, title, content, start_datetime, end_datetime, alarm_datetime, alarm_sent_yn, alarm_sent_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{startDatetime}, #{endDatetime}, #{alarmDatetime}, #{alarmSentYn}, #{alarmSentAt}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE schedules SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, start_datetime = #{startDatetime}, end_datetime = #{endDatetime}, alarm_datetime = #{alarmDatetime}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE schedule_id = #{scheduleId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT schedule_id, user_id, title, content, start_datetime, end_datetime, alarm_datetime, alarm_sent_yn, alarm_sent_at, created_at, updated_at FROM schedules WHERE alarm_sent_yn = 'N' AND alarm_datetime IS NOT NULL AND alarm_datetime <= #{now} ORDER BY alarm_datetime ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE schedules SET alarm_sent_yn = 'Y', alarm_sent_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE schedule_id = #{scheduleId}
